Division

MDU Division

Carbide - tools - electrodes - nozzles

EURACCIAI has been active in cutting tools and wear parts/components made of tungsten carbide for more than fifty years.

We supply companies in Italy, Europe and worldwide with materials and tools for demanding production processes: chip removal machining, forming, tube scarfing, marking of tubes and mechanical components, resistance welding, abrasive blasting, and applications requiring high wear resistance, mechanical strength, low friction, high hardness, or high conductivity.

Our experience and in-depth technical know-how allow us to provide the tool, component, or material best suited to achieve your quality, cost, and productivity targets.

Euracciai also offers stock materials and custom-made solutions for fast deliveries and tailor-made projects, with focus on production continuity and traceability.

Contact
Contents

Products and partners listed for this division

ALBROMET Tube Bending Equipment

Albromet aluminum-bronze alloys are produced with advanced technologies and strict controls; omnidirectional and modular mandrels are available for CNC tube benders.

Resistance Welding Electrodes

Euracciai has been producing and supplying custom electrodes for many years, with incoming material checks and 100% inspection of produced parts.

Tube and Profile Cut-Off Blades

Vertical and horizontal blades for tube/profile cutting lines, including solutions for ferritic and austenitic steels.

ALBROMET ALUMINUM-BRONZE ALLOYS

Alloys with high wear resistance and low friction for plant and machinery components.

ALBROMET High-Conductivity Copper Alloys

High-conductivity copper alloys for molds and electrodes, combining thermal conductivity with wear resistance.

Industrial Marking

Engraved dies, punches, characters, and marking systems for metals and tubes.

Tungsten, Molybdenum, Copper and Alloys

Wide stock range in round/square bars, sheets, flats and wire, with custom machining available.

Tungsten Carbide - Boron - Silicon Nozzles

Highly wear-resistant nozzles for abrasive applications and high-wear processes.

Carbide Bushings and Wear Parts

Wear-resistant components for severe environments with high mechanical stress.

Special Carbide Cutting Tools

Custom tools designed to improve quality, productivity, and service life.
